2382040.name: HellCat 2: The Riot Inferno
2382040.description:
HellCat 2: The Riot Inferno is an alternate history of a hurricane cat in a red scarf. More enemies and bosses. More weapons and ammo. More lives and deadly dangers. More drive and hellish meat.
Break through the hordes of enemies with your own sharp claws or a set of powerful firearms. Use cover and other tactics to turn the defense into a devastating attack. And in the room between levels, a friend will be waiting for you, where you can take a breath and buy upgrades.

Top-down slasher shooter game. The task at each level is to destroy all enemies and then a portal to the next level appears.

Peculiarities:
--- Driving soundtrack
--- Potato system requirements
--- High difficulty and pace of the game
--- A lot of shooting and explosions (well, a lot)
2382040.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 捷克语, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 乌克兰语
